el: The API key (credential) that generated this usage record.
en: The API key (credential) that generated this usage record.
zh: 生成该使用记录的 API 密钥（凭证）。

el: Column header in the usage breakdown table for the total points a single API consumed within the selected time range.
en: Column header in the usage breakdown table for the total points a single API consumed within the selected time range.
zh: 使用明细表格中，单个 API 在所选时间范围内消耗的积分总量列标题。

el: Column header in the usage breakdown table for a single API's percentage of the total consumption.
en: Column header in the usage breakdown table for a single API's percentage of the total consumption.
zh: 使用明细表格中，单个 API 消耗占总消耗百分比的列标题。

el: Toggle label at the top-right of the usage table; when on, the latest records refresh automatically on an interval.
en: Toggle label at the top-right of the usage table; when on, the latest records refresh automatically on an interval.
zh: 使用记录表格右上角的开关标签，开启后定时自动刷新最新记录。

el: Placeholder shown in the status code column while an async task has not yet returned a final status code.
en: Placeholder shown in the status code column while an async task has not yet returned a final status code.
zh: 异步任务尚未返回最终状态码时，状态码列显示的占位文案。

el: Series name in the usage-trend chart that aggregates all APIs outside the top spenders.
en: Series name in the usage-trend chart that aggregates all APIs outside the top spenders.
zh: 使用趋势图中，除消耗最高的若干 API 外，其余 API 合并显示的系列名称。

el: Title of the usage analytics card, which contains trend, share, and breakdown view tabs.
en: Title of the usage analytics card, which contains trend, share, and breakdown view tabs.
zh: 使用分析卡片的标题，卡片内含趋势、占比、明细三个视图切换。

el: View switch button in the usage analytics card: stacked bar chart of per-API consumption over time.
en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: stacked bar chart of per-API consumption over time.
zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：按时间展示各 API 消耗的堆叠柱状图。

el: View switch button in the usage analytics card: doughnut chart of each API's consumption share.
en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: doughnut chart of each API's consumption share.
zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：展示各 API 消耗占比的环形图。

el: View switch button in the usage analytics card: a table listing every API's exact consumption and share.
en: View switch button in the usage analytics card: a table listing every API's exact consumption and share.
zh: 使用分析卡片的视图切换按钮：以表格列出全部 API 的精确消耗与占比。

el: Error toast shown when the CSV export request fails (network or server error).
en: Error toast shown when the CSV export request fails (network or server error).
zh: CSV 导出请求失败（网络或服务端错误）时的错误提示
